post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks every developer needs to know for better performance
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks every developer needs to know for better performance

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: Claude API Developer Essentials
slides.subtitle: 4 tips for better performance and results

slides.title: Smart Response Caching
slides.body: Use cache_control to automatically cache expensive API calls and reduce costs by up to 90%.

slides.title: Structured JSON Outputs
slides.body: Force consistent JSON responses using the new output_config.format parameter instead of prompt instructions.

slides.title: Async Batch Processing
slides.body: Process multiple requests simultaneously with async/await to dramatically improve throughput.
slides.code_snippet:
async def process_batch(prompts):
    tasks = [client.messages.create(
        model="claude-3-haiku-20240307",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": p}]
    ) for p in prompts]

slides.title: Smart Error Handling
slides.body: Implement exponential backoff for rate limits and proper exception handling for production reliability.

slides.title: Want More API Tips?
slides.body: Follow @ask.claudeai for daily Claude API tricks and save this post for reference!
